summary: Large Character Select Screen decomp/matching slice centered on src/melee/mn/mncharsel.c. The PR added an implementation for mnCharSel_802640A0, updated multiple nearby mncharsel functions, tightened headers/types, and added a target_funcs.txt checklist. Evidence includes a bot report showing mncharsel progress but also one broken match and some unrelated reported score movement.

key_files.role: Primary decomp source; received 974 added lines and 74 deleted lines, including mnCharSel_802640A0 and many matching-oriented edits in surrounding CSS functions.
Public header signature update for recovered mnCharSel_802640A0.
evidence_refs: raw_diff.diff:1360-1370: UNK_RET mnCharSel_802640A0(UNK_PARAMS) changed to s32 mnCharSel_802640A0(void)

key_files.role: Static CSS support declarations; added CSSSceneModels and CSSAnimSet structs, new static GObj globals, and adjusted CSSDoorsData initializer for xd3.
Type recovery for CSSDoorsData.xd3 from float to HSD_Text*.
Added checklist of mncharsel functions targeted by the PR.

what_changed.text: Added s32 mnCharSel_802640A0(void), a large CSS setup routine that creates/loads scene objects, camera/light/fog data, text, cursor, and character model objects using CSSSceneModels and CSSAnimSet casts.
Updated mnCharSel_802640A0's header declaration from unknown return/params to s32 and void.

Recovered or refined types around CSS data: TextKerning* for HSD_SisLib_803A6478 result, HSD_Text* for CSSDoorsData.xd3, CSSData* css locals, CSSIcon* icons locals, and CSSSceneModels/CSSAnimSet structs.

Adjusted variable signedness/widths and casts in handicap, cursor, port, icon, and door handling; several u8 or s8 temporaries became int or s32 while assignments retained explicit u8 casts where needed.

Reworked local expression shape in several functions, including replacing pointer aliases to mnCharSel_803F0DFC.scroll/page fields with direct field access and rewriting costume duplicate selection as while(1) with a break after the duplicate check.

Added target_funcs.txt listing eleven checked mncharsel functions, including mnCharSel_802640A0, mnCharSel_8025FB50, mnCharSel_8025FDEC, fn_80262648, fn_8025F0E0, fn_802633B0, mnCharSel_8025DB34, and mnCharSel_CursorThink.

smart_moves.text: Moved recovered function knowledge into the owning header rather than leaving mnCharSel_802640A0 as UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.
Used typed fields and locals for recovered CSS/menu data instead of preserving raw casts or pointer aliases where a type was available.
Kept matching-specific stack steering narrow in the shown diff: mnCharSel_8025FB50 retained PAD_STACK but reduced it from 16 to 8 alongside other local-shape changes.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered function body proves a signature, update the owning header at the same time; this PR changed mnCharSel_802640A0 from unknown return/params to s32(void).

For menu/CSS matching, replacing decompiler pointer aliases with recovered struct fields can improve reviewability and preserve match shape; the diff replaced local u8* aliases for scroll/page fields with direct mnCharSel_803F0DFC field access and typed xd3 as HSD_Text*.

Small integer temporaries in MWCC-matched menu code may need wider int/s32 locals plus explicit narrowing casts at assignments or calls; the PR repeatedly changed u8/s8 temps to int/s32 while keeping u8 casts around handicap/player/icon operations.

naming_conventions.name: CSSSceneModels
naming_conventions.meaning: Static struct grouping camera, light, and fog descriptors used by mnCharSel_802640A0.

naming_conventions.name: CSSAnimSet
naming_conventions.meaning: Static struct grouping joint, anim, matanim, and shapeanim descriptors used by mnCharSel_802640A0.

naming_conventions.name: MODELS
naming_conventions.meaning: Local cast macro for mnCharSel_804D6CB4 as CSSSceneModels*.

naming_conventions.name: ANIM
naming_conventions.meaning: Local cast macro for mnCharSel_804D6CD8 as CSSAnimSet*.

naming_conventions.name: icons
naming_conventions.meaning: CSSIcon* local recovered by casting from &mnCharSel_803F0A48 + 1 in several CSS icon-selection functions.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Local declaration order and variable-width tuning
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: The diff changes ordering and type widths for temporaries such as hval/hval2/hval3/hval4, val, player, grabbed, port, n_doors, and icon_idx. This appears matching-oriented, but no inline author explanation is present.
mnCharSel_8025FB50 keeps PAD_STACK but changes it from 16 to 8 while adding an icons local.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Typed temporary structs over opaque data blobs
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: CSSSceneModels and CSSAnimSet were introduced to express camera/light/fog and animation descriptor arrays in mncharsel setup code.
The duplicate-costume loop in mnCharSel_8025FB50 changed from preassign plus while(isDuplicateCostume) to while(1) with assignment, negative duplicate check, break, and increment.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Reported matched code +0.04% (+1600 bytes) and matched data +0.00% (+32 bytes), with mncharsel improvements including mnCharSel_802640A0 +8811 bytes to 86.22%, fn_802633B0 to 92.06%, mnCharSel_8025FDEC to 91.88%, mnCharSel_8025FB50 to 86.91%, fn_8025F0E0 to 94.83%, fn_80262648 to 98.28%, and mnCharSel_8025D1C4 to 99.48%.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Reported one broken match in main/melee/mn/mncharsel: mnCharSel_8026688C_OnEnter changed from 100.00% to 99.90%.
No review comments and no human review text were present in the supplied slice.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: only PR body and bot issue comment

notes: PR body is empty and there are no human review comments in the supplied slice.
The raw diff loaded in the prompt is truncated, but targeted local reads captured the header/static/type/target_funcs tail.

The bot report includes mncharsel progress but also unrelated gr unit improvements/regressions even though changed files list only mncharsel and target_funcs.txt; this should be treated as verifier context, not author intent.
target_funcs.txt marks functions as checked, but the bot report shows mnCharSel_802640A0 improved to 86.22%, not fully matched; do not infer all checklist entries are verified matches.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Update owning headers when a recovered body proves a signature
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2536, mnCharSel_802640A0 gained a body and its header declaration changed from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to s32(void). This is a concrete example of recovering the body and removing unknown prototypes in the owning header.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Typed CSS fields and descriptor structs can replace opaque menu data access
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2536 introduced CSSSceneModels/CSSAnimSet and changed CSSDoorsData.xd3 to HSD_Text*, allowing mncharsel code to use typed fields and descriptor groups instead of float/void-style access.

source_update_candidates.title: src/melee/mn/mncharsel.c owns Character Select Screen menu code and CSS setup routines
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2536 changed src/melee/mn/mncharsel.c heavily and added/reworked CSS functions such as mnCharSel_802640A0, mnCharSel_8025FB50, mnCharSel_8025FDEC, fn_80262648, fn_802633B0, and mnCharSel_CursorThink.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path ownership/search fact, but should be curated against existing source/path facts before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: CSSDoorsData.xd3 typed as HSD_Text* in PR 2536
source_update_candidates.text: The diff changes struct CSSDoorsData field xd3 from float to HSD_Text* and updates its static initializer from 0.0F to NULL.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential data/type-sheet fact; needs curator verification against current source and any canonical data schema.

source_update_candidates.title: Investigate bot-reported broken match in mnCharSel_8026688C_OnEnter
source_update_candidates.text: The bot report for PR 2536 showed mnCharSel_8026688C_OnEnter regressing from 100.00% to 99.90% despite the PR being merged.
source_update_candidates.reason: Could be useful in a regression/verification ledger, but the slice does not explain whether it was accepted, fixed later, or considered noise.

rejection_notes: Do not promote target_funcs.txt checklist entries as verified full matches; the bot report shows several mncharsel functions as partial improvements, including mnCharSel_802640A0 at 86.22%.
Do not infer reviewer intent or acceptance rationale; no human review comments are present.
Do not treat unrelated grpushon/grpura/grgreens bot score movement as PR-authored source changes, because changed_files lists only mncharsel files and target_funcs.txt.
